# assistant-gateway 配置项

<!-- GENERATED by rtime_config.schema_to_markdown — do not edit by hand. Regenerate: python -m rtime_config <module:Model> and review the diff. -->

| 字段 | env 名 | 类型 | 默认值 | 秘密 | 生效 | 说明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `bind` | `GATEWAY_BIND` | string | `127.0.0.1` |  | restart | Listen address. Bind the Tailscale address only in prod; never 0.0.0.0 on a public host. |
| `port` | `GATEWAY_PORT` | integer | `8765` |  | restart | Listen port. KEEP IN SYNC with the Obsidian plugin / deploy env / docs default 8765 (see maintainability-standards.zh-CN.md §三). |
| `brain_root` | `BRAIN_ROOT` | string | `/mnt/brain` |  | restart | Brain library root the gateway reads (memory, context sources, relations default under it). |
| `index_pythonpath` | `INDEX_PYTHONPATH` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | PYTHONPATH shim for the in-process brain index (packages/brain-library/src). Empty => $HOME/rtime-assistant/packages/brain-library/src (from_env). |
| `index_db` | `INDEX_DB` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Brain index sqlite path. Empty => $HOME/.local/state/rtime-assistant/brain-library/brain-library.sqlite. |
| `log_dir` | `GATEWAY_LOG_DIR` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Gateway run-log / state dir. Empty => $HOME/.local/state/rtime-assistant/assistant-gateway. |
| `claude_bin` | `CLAUDE_BIN` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | claude CLI / claude-kimi wrapper path. Empty => $HOME/.local/bin/claude-kimi (from_env). |
| `claude_timeout` | `CLAUDE_TIMEOUT` | integer | `110` |  | restart | Per-request model wall-clock timeout (seconds). |
| `claude_max_turns` | `CLAUDE_MAX_TURNS` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Global tool-turn cap. Empty/0 = UNCAPPED (bounded by claude_timeout); a low fixed cap truncated multi-PDF/dedup answers. Opt-in only. Per-request options.max_tool_turns overrides. |
| `claude_investigation_timeout` | `CLAUDE_INVESTIGATION_TIMEOUT` | integer | `180` |  | restart | Longer timeout for duplicate-check / multi-file PDF/slide scans. |
| `claude_web_timeout` | `CLAUDE_WEB_TIMEOUT` | integer | `170` |  | restart | Longer timeout for public web/search requests (search + fetch + final answer). |
| `claude_runtime_diag_timeout` | `CLAUDE_RUNTIME_DIAG_TIMEOUT` | integer | `90` |  | restart | Runtime-error follow-ups call the model on redacted gateway logs. |
| `claude_bare` | `CLAUDE_BARE` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Claude Code startup trims for the Obsidian gateway. Auto-skipped by the gateway when extra_allowed_tools contains mcp__. |
| `claude_no_session_persistence` | `CLAUDE_NO_SESSION_PERSISTENCE` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Disable Claude Code session persistence for gateway runs. |
| `claude_exclude_dynamic_sections` | `CLAUDE_EXCLUDE_DYNAMIC_SECTIONS` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Exclude dynamic CLAUDE.md sections at startup for the gateway. |
| `claude_permission_mode` | `CLAUDE_PERMISSION_MODE` | string | `dontAsk` |  | restart | Default Claude Code permission mode for tool-capable routes. Sanitized to a known mode; per-request may override in readonly; full mode forces bypassPermissions. |
| `approval_forwarding_enabled` | `GATEWAY_APPROVAL_FORWARDING` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Forward tool-approval prompts to the client. |
| `gateway_access_mode` | `GATEWAY_ACCESS_MODE` | string | `readonly` |  | restart | Access mode. Default readonly; 'full' only for trusted, owner-operated endpoints (normalized via access_mode()). |
| `web_tools_enabled` | `GATEWAY_WEB_TOOLS_ENABLED` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Enable Claude Code built-in WebSearch/WebFetch + the controlled read-only rtime-web-fetch fallback. |
| `extra_allowed_tools` | `GATEWAY_EXTRA_ALLOWED_TOOLS` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Comma-separated extra Claude Code tool names or MCP tool globs (e.g. mcp__browser__*). Only names implemented by the live runner/MCP config are installed. |
| `memory_capture_enabled` | `MEMORY_CAPTURE_ENABLED` | boolean | `false` |  | restart | M9 memory-loop capture. Off by default; run-03 enables after backup + health checks. |
| `memory_failed_query_log_enabled` | `MEMORY_FAILED_QUERY_LOG_ENABLED` | boolean | `false` |  | restart | Log failed/zero-hit queries for the memory loop. Off by default. |
| `memory_capture_max_chars` | `MEMORY_CAPTURE_MAX_CHARS` | integer | `800` |  | restart | Max chars captured per memory-loop record. |
| `memory_injection_enabled` | `MEMORY_INJECTION_ENABLED` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Approved-memory prompt injection. Reads only brain/memory/cards/ normal, non-inferred, unexpired cards; review queue is never injected. |
| `memory_root` | `MEMORY_ROOT` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Memory store root. Empty => brain_root/memory (from_env). |
| `memory_injection_max_cards` | `MEMORY_INJECTION_MAX_CARDS` | integer | `3` |  | restart | Max memory cards injected into a prompt. |
| `memory_injection_max_chars` | `MEMORY_INJECTION_MAX_CHARS` | integer | `1200` |  | restart | Max total chars of injected memory cards. |
| `memory_access_log_enabled` | `MEMORY_ACCESS_LOG_ENABLED` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Log memory-card access (audit). |
| `context_sources_enabled` | `GATEWAY_CONTEXT_SOURCES_ENABLED` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Dynamic context sources. Registry is metadata-only JSONL; source bodies read from safe brain-relative paths only when relevant. |
| `context_sources_path` | `GATEWAY_CONTEXT_SOURCES_PATH` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Context-source registry JSONL. Empty => brain_root/_system/rtime-context-sources.jsonl. |
| `context_sources_max_items` | `GATEWAY_CONTEXT_SOURCES_MAX_ITEMS` | integer | `3` |  | restart | Max context-source items resolved per request. |
| `context_sources_max_chars` | `GATEWAY_CONTEXT_SOURCES_MAX_CHARS` | integer | `5000` |  | restart | Max total chars of resolved context sources. |
| `memory_candidate_write_enabled` | `GATEWAY_MEMORY_CANDIDATE_WRITE_ENABLED` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | 'remember this' intents write review-queue candidates only; they do not merge into long-term memory/cards without a separate review flow. |
| `memory_candidate_review_dir` | `GATEWAY_MEMORY_CANDIDATE_REVIEW_DIR` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Review-queue dir for memory candidates. Empty => brain_root/memory/review-queue. |
| `relations_path` | `GATEWAY_RELATIONS_PATH` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Relation index JSONL for related/citation-review prefetch. Empty => brain_root/_indexes/relations.jsonl. |
| `related_prefetch_limit` | `GATEWAY_RELATED_PREFETCH_LIMIT` | integer | `5` |  | restart | Max related items prefetched. |
| `related_prefetch_max_chars` | `GATEWAY_RELATED_PREFETCH_MAX_CHARS` | integer | `1200` |  | restart | Max total chars of prefetched related items. |
| `queue_max` | `QUEUE_MAX` | integer | `2` |  | restart | FIFO queue capacity for busy requests; only a full queue rejects (503). |
| `queue_wait_timeout` | `QUEUE_WAIT_TIMEOUT` | number | `30.0` |  | restart | Max seconds a queued request waits before timing out. |
| `queue_heartbeat_secs` | `QUEUE_HEARTBEAT_SECS` | number | `3.0` |  | restart | Streaming waiters get 排队中… heartbeats this often. |
| `prepare_cache_ttl` | `GATEWAY_PREPARE_CACHE_TTL` | integer | `180` |  | restart | /api/obsidian/prepare short-lived resolved-context TTL (seconds). |
| `prepare_cache_max` | `GATEWAY_PREPARE_CACHE_MAX` | integer | `64` |  | restart | Max entries in the prepare cache. |
| `prewarm_enabled` | `GATEWAY_PREWARM_ENABLED` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Optional model prewarm during prepare (plugin must send options.prewarm_model=true; prepare still returns immediately). |
| `live_prewarm_enabled` | `GATEWAY_LIVE_PREWARM_ENABLED` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Single-use live-stdin prewarm process for tool-capable routes (preserves model/tool quality). 0 => legacy short prewarm call. |
| `live_prewarm_idle_seconds` | `GATEWAY_LIVE_PREWARM_IDLE_SECONDS` | integer | `240` |  | restart | Idle ceiling before a live-prewarm process is recycled. |
| `prewarm_ttl_seconds` | `GATEWAY_PREWARM_TTL_SECONDS` | integer | `240` |  | restart | Legacy short-call prewarm TTL (chat-only OpenAI routes + fallback when live prewarm disabled). |
| `prewarm_timeout` | `GATEWAY_PREWARM_TIMEOUT` | integer | `30` |  | restart | Legacy short-call prewarm timeout (seconds). |
| `history_max_chars` | `HISTORY_MAX_CHARS` | integer | `4000` |  | restart | context.history is clipped to this many chars (newest turns kept). |
| `stream_trace_enabled` | `GATEWAY_STREAM_TRACE` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Emit gateway stream-trace diagnostics. |
| `intake_max_mb` | `GATEWAY_INTAKE_MAX_MB` | integer | `64` |  | restart | Max inbound intake payload size (MB). |
| `file_extract_max_files` | `GATEWAY_FILE_EXTRACT_MAX_FILES` | integer | `4` |  | restart | Max attached files whose text is extracted per request. |
| `file_extract_max_chars` | `GATEWAY_FILE_EXTRACT_MAX_CHARS` | integer | `80000` |  | restart | Max extracted text chars per request. |
| `notify_target` | `GATEWAY_NOTIFY_TARGET` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Optional notify target (feishu open_id / channel) for gateway alerts. |
| `reminder_register` | `GATEWAY_REMINDER_REGISTER` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | rtime-reminder-register CLI path. Empty => $HOME/.local/bin/rtime-reminder-register. |
| `model_catalog_path` | `GATEWAY_MODEL_CATALOG_PATH` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Obsidian model-catalog cache path. Empty => log_dir/model-catalog.json. |
| `plugin_release_dir` | `GATEWAY_PLUGIN_RELEASE_DIR` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Private Obsidian plugin release folder served at /api/obsidian/plugin-release/. Empty => $HOME/.local/share/rtime-assistant/plugin-release/rtime-assistant. |
| `model_refresh_timeout` | `GATEWAY_MODEL_REFRESH_TIMEOUT` | number | `8.0` |  | restart | Model catalog refresh timeout (seconds). |
| `moonshot_base_url` | `RTIME_MOONSHOT_BASE_URL` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Moonshot/Kimi OpenAI base URL. Empty => the rtime-models registry base_url('moonshot-openai'); trailing slash stripped (from_env). |
| `ustc_base_url` | `RTIME_USTC_BASE_URL` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | USTC OpenAI base URL. Empty => the rtime-models registry base_url('ustc-openai'); trailing slash stripped (from_env). |
| `ustc_api_key_file` | `RTIME_USTC_API_KEY_FILE` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Path to the USTC API keyfile (the PATH is not secret; the file holds the key, read by models._read_secret). Empty => $HOME/.config/rtime-assistant/ustc-api-key. |
| `gateway_url` | `RTIME_GATEWAY_URL` | string | `http://127.0.0.1:8765` |  | restart | Base URL the rtime_chat client posts to (default the Tailscale gateway address). |
